description.value:
Send Prescription processing chronische-medicatie building blocks for patient C. XXX_Brugge
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 1 chronische medicatie Afhandelen medicatievoorschrift met een toedieningsafspraak gebruiksperiode ingangsdatum (chronische medicatie)
Send Prescription processing chronische-medicatie resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '202185') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3891') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '61433') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '202185') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3891') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '61433') ))).where((quantity.value = 21)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '202185|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (ROTER APC TABLET)
